headings.usage: Use for all H1-H4 headings. Apply tracking-tight for H1-H2. Do NOT use Inter for headings.

body.usage: Use for body text, form inputs, labels, and dashboard data. Highly legible.

mono.usage: Use for trade metrics, stock tickers, date/time, and numeric data.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-extrabold
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-bold

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Start mobile-first. Use optical alignment. The dashboard should use progressive disclosure, hiding complexity until needed.

marketing_page.grid: Gridcols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 to gap-12. Asymmetrical bento grids for features.
marketing_page.hero: High visual impact, overlay with max bg-black/40 if image is used. Massive typography.

dashboard.content: Grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. One insight per scroll. High information density but clear hierarchy.
dashboard.cards: Subtle roundness (rounded-lg or rounded-xl max 8px). Flat solid background. 1px subtle border, no heavy shadow unless hovered.

components.buttons: Shadcn UI Buttons. Minimalist. Primary button is stark contrast (Black in light mode, White in dark mode).
components.inputs_and_forms: Shadcn UI Input, Select, Textarea. Use clear validation states. No custom raw HTML inputs.
components.cards: Cardless or subtle 1px border cards. Dashboard components must utilize full height to avoid jagged bottoms.
components.dialogs: Shadcn Dialog for confirmations and complex forms (like 'Create Trade' modal). Ensure 'Create Journal' can be a full page or a massive dialog.
components.navigation: Sticky glassmorphism header for landing page (backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/70). Static sidebar for dashboard.
components.skeletons: Shadcn Skeleton for loading states. Content-shaped placeholders with shimmer.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Hover states must increase contrast and show subtle transform (e.g., -translate-y-1).
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties (transition-transform, transition-colors duration-200 ease-out).
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Framer motion for staggered list entrance. Fade in for images.

image_urls.description: Dark abstract stock market chart. Use for a high-end, immersive hero section background or marketing imagery.
Trader at desk. Ideal for the 'Why Choose Us' or 'Benefits' section.
Man using phone and laptop, good for 'Trade anywhere' feature block.
Abstract logo shape for social proof / testimonials section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Generate Tailwind variables in global css for the light/dark mode.
Implement the landing page using custom Tailwind and HTML structure. Use Framer Motion for scroll animations.
Implement the dashboard using Shadcn UI components heavily. Use a fixed sidebar layout.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for robust testing.
Ensure dark mode toggle works perfectly.
For typography, import 'Cabinet Grotesk', 'Manrope', and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts or Fontshare.
Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', 'Open Sans', 'Lato', or 'Syne' for Headings.
Build forms with React Hook Form + Zod + Shadcn Form components.
Implement a confirmation dialog using Shadcn AlertDialog before deleting a journal entry.
